problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
